mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_supplier_pool (name, category, is_disabled) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{isDisabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_supplier_pool SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE name = #{name} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_supplier_pool SET is_disabled = #{isDisabled} WHERE id = #{id}
